summary: High‑energy 1990 show with Jerry on fire and a solid soundboard capture despite a brief drum cut and mono quirks.
review: The performance is described as one of the top shows of the era, with the band “on” and a particularly powerful The Other One > Dew sequence.  The recording is generally praised – it sounds great and captures the crowd’s excitement – though listeners note a short drum‑to‑space cut that needs patching and that the mix plays back in mono.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show highly (4–5 stars) and praise the musical energy, while recording comments are mixed but overall favorable; combined weighting yields a strong above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally clear and energetic, but contains a brief drum‑to‑space cut that requires patching; playback is mono and some reviewers note vocal emphasis that can bury instruments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans highlight a soaring musical conversation throughout, especially the intense The Other One > Dew segment; overall pacing is praised as lively and engaging.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as "on" all night with exceptional guitar work.
band_member_comments.Drums: A short cut in the drums > space section is noted; otherwise performance is solid.
